acquisition method: data were acquired using targeted scans and data-dependent acquisition (DDA).
cleavage agent: mass spectrometry proteomics data have been deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium via the PRIDE partner repository with the dataset identifier PXD007925 and 10.6019/PXD007925.
collision energy: MS/MS was acquired using collision induced dissociation (CID) with normalized collision energy of 35.
fragmentation method: MS/MS was acquired using collision induced dissociation (CID).
instrument: nLC was coupled online to an LTQ-Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer.
ionization type: The label-free proteomics analysis was performed using the nanoelectrospray ionization (ESI) tandem MS.
labeling: The label-free proteomics analysis was performed using the nanoelectrospray ionization (ESI) tandem MS.
